attributes.readMe: # BoomPerson Card Spec ## Summary The `BoomPerson` card spec defines a card that represents a person, with a `firstName` field. It also contains a `BoomField` which is designed to explode when serialized. ## Import ```javascript import { BoomPerson } from 'https://realms-staging.stack.cards/experiments/boom-pet'; ``` ## Usage as a Field To use the `BoomPerson` card as a field within a consuming card or field, you can add it as a `contains` field: ```javascript import { contains, field, CardDef, FieldDef, StringField, } from 'https://cardstack.com/base/card-api'; export class ConsumingCard extends CardDef { @field boomPerson = contains(BoomPerson); } ``` ## Template Usage To display a `BoomPerson` card within a template, you can use the `@fields.firstName` helper: ```html ```
